title: Evangelion 3010 runtime revealed
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 runtime revealed Post by khronos » Thu Feb 18, 2021 8:15 pm According to this youtube channel (due to the release of the age classification of the film, G - can be considered as PG), the runtime is 154 minutes: https://youtu.be/xxdBlpAqBJk

[]: Re: Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 runtime revealed Post by Blockio » Thu Feb 18, 2021 9:16 pm The topic has been discussed in quite some length in this thread
